title: Modern Python Foundations
description: Beginning programmers and career changers who need a rigorous path from first Python execution to a tested, installable local automation product. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate python 3.14 language foundations through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate files, modules, environments, testing, and debugging through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate four cumulative command-line and data projects through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

competencies.statement: Explain how source, the interpreter, objects, and standard streams participate when a Python program runs.
misconceptions: Python source is converted directly into hardware instructions without a runtime.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Explain how source, the interpreter, objects, and standard streams participate when a Python program runs.

competencies.statement: Choose REPL, script, module, or notebook execution based on the task and reproducibility needs.
misconceptions: Interactive history is automatically a reproducible application artifact.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose REPL, script, module, or notebook execution based on the task and reproducibility needs.

competencies.statement: Read syntax errors and tracebacks from the final exception back to the relevant source cause.
misconceptions: The first line of every traceback always names the root cause.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Read syntax errors and tracebacks from the final exception back to the relevant source cause.

competencies.statement: Use an editor, terminal, working directory, and command history without losing file or environment context.
misconceptions: The current working directory is always the directory containing the script.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use an editor, terminal, working directory, and command history without losing file or environment context.

competencies.statement: Apply readable naming, formatting, comments, docstrings, and small commits as correctness-supporting tools.
misconceptions: Style matters only after a program is complete and cannot prevent defects.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply readable naming, formatting, comments, docstrings, and small commits as correctness-supporting tools.

competencies.statement: Distinguish values, objects, names, assignment, equality, and identity in Python execution.
misconceptions: Assignment copies every object into a new independent memory location.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish values, objects, names, assignment, equality, and identity in Python execution.

competencies.statement: Use integers, floating-point values, decimal-sensitive decisions, arithmetic precedence, and division operators accurately.
misconceptions: Binary floating-point represents every decimal fraction exactly.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use integers, floating-point values, decimal-sensitive decisions, arithmetic precedence, and division operators accurately.

competencies.statement: Use Boolean values and None as distinct domain states instead of ambiguous numeric or text sentinels.
misconceptions: None, zero, false, and an empty string always mean the same thing.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use Boolean values and None as distinct domain states instead of ambiguous numeric or text sentinels.

competencies.statement: Inspect runtime types and supported operations without treating type names as user-facing validation.
misconceptions: Calling type on a value proves every later operation will succeed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect runtime types and supported operations without treating type names as user-facing validation.

competencies.statement: Convert external text to typed values with explicit validation and recoverable failure behavior.
misconceptions: Calling int or float on user input is complete input validation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Convert external text to typed values with explicit validation and recoverable failure behavior.

competencies.statement: Use multiple assignment, unpacking, starred targets, and constants conventions without obscuring data shape.
misconceptions: Uppercase names create values that Python prevents from changing.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use multiple assignment, unpacking, starred targets, and constants conventions without obscuring data shape.

competencies.statement: Create string literals with correct quoting, escapes, raw forms, multiline content, and Unicode characters.
misconceptions: Raw strings disable every form of backslash processing in every position.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create string literals with correct quoting, escapes, raw forms, multiline content, and Unicode characters.

competencies.statement: Use string indexing, slicing, membership, length, and immutability without off-by-one assumptions.
misconceptions: Changing one indexed character mutates the original string in place.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use string indexing, slicing, membership, length, and immutability without off-by-one assumptions.

competencies.statement: Choose search, split, join, strip, replace, case, and predicate methods from the actual text contract.
misconceptions: Strip removes matching characters from anywhere inside a string.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose search, split, join, strip, replace, case, and predicate methods from the actual text contract.

competencies.statement: Use f-strings and format specifications for readable values, alignment, precision, dates, and debug output.
misconceptions: Formatting a value changes the value stored in the underlying variable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use f-strings and format specifications for readable values, alignment, precision, dates, and debug output.

competencies.statement: Distinguish text from bytes and encode or decode at explicit system boundaries with named error policy.
misconceptions: A Python string is a sequence of UTF-8 bytes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish text from bytes and encode or decode at explicit system boundaries with named error policy.

competencies.statement: Use regular expressions for justified pattern structure while preferring simpler string operations for simple parsing.
misconceptions: A single large regular expression is always clearer than staged text parsing.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use regular expressions for justified pattern structure while preferring simpler string operations for simple parsing.

competencies.statement: Predict truth testing, chained comparisons, equality, identity, membership, and Boolean operator results.
misconceptions: And and or always return a Boolean rather than one of their operands.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Predict truth testing, chained comparisons, equality, identity, membership, and Boolean operator results.

competencies.statement: Use if, elif, else, conditional expressions, and guard clauses to express exclusive and early-exit decisions.
misconceptions: Deep nesting is necessary whenever a rule has several conditions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use if, elif, else, conditional expressions, and guard clauses to express exclusive and early-exit decisions.

competencies.statement: Use match and case for structural patterns, captures, guards, alternatives, and exhaustive fallback behavior.
misconceptions: Match case is a faster replacement for every if and elif chain.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use match and case for structural patterns, captures, guards, alternatives, and exhaustive fallback behavior.

competencies.statement: Iterate directly over values and use range only when a numeric sequence is part of the task.
misconceptions: Every for loop should iterate over indexes and then look up values.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Iterate directly over values and use range only when a numeric sequence is part of the task.

competencies.statement: Design while loops with explicit state progress, termination evidence, and recoverable input behavior.
misconceptions: A while true loop is safe whenever a break appears somewhere in its body.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design while loops with explicit state progress, termination evidence, and recoverable input behavior.

competencies.statement: Use enumerate and zip to preserve index or parallel-sequence meaning without manual counter drift.
misconceptions: Zip raises an error automatically whenever input lengths differ.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use enumerate and zip to preserve index or parallel-sequence meaning without manual counter drift.

competencies.statement: Use break, continue, loop else, and nested-loop extraction without skipping required work or hiding termination.
misconceptions: Loop else runs only when the loop body executes at least once.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use break, continue, loop else, and nested-loop extraction without skipping required work or hiding termination.

competencies.statement: Define and call functions with purposeful names, small responsibilities, docstrings, and testable behavior.
misconceptions: Moving lines under def automatically creates a reusable abstraction.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define and call functions with purposeful names, small responsibilities, docstrings, and testable behavior.

competencies.statement: Use positional-only, positional-or-keyword, keyword-only, default, variadic positional, and variadic keyword parameters deliberately.
misconceptions: Args and kwargs are required whenever a function accepts more than two inputs.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use positional-only, positional-or-keyword, keyword-only, default, variadic positional, and variadic keyword parameters deliberately.

competencies.statement: Choose defaults without shared mutable state and distinguish omitted values from explicit None when needed.
misconceptions: A mutable default is recreated for every function call.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose defaults without shared mutable state and distinguish omitted values from explicit None when needed.

competencies.statement: Return coherent values and avoid mixing computation, printing, mutation, and error signaling without a contract.
misconceptions: A function that prints a value also returns that printed value.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Return coherent values and avoid mixing computation, printing, mutation, and error signaling without a contract.

competencies.statement: Trace local, enclosing, global, and built-in name resolution plus variable lifetime before using global or nonlocal.
misconceptions: Python resolves every name from the global scope first.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Trace local, enclosing, global, and built-in name resolution plus variable lifetime before using global or nonlocal.

competencies.statement: Use closures, functions as values, lambda expressions, and higher-order operations when they simplify a stable behavior boundary.
misconceptions: A lambda is inherently faster and more reusable than a named function.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use closures, functions as values, lambda expressions, and higher-order operations when they simplify a stable behavior boundary.

competencies.statement: Write modern annotations for function inputs and outputs while recognizing that Python does not enforce them at runtime.
misconceptions: A type annotation makes the interpreter reject every mismatched argument.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write modern annotations for function inputs and outputs while recognizing that Python does not enforce them at runtime.

competencies.statement: Choose recursion or iteration from data shape, termination, depth, state, and readability constraints.
misconceptions: Recursion is always the most Pythonic approach to nested data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose recursion or iteration from data shape, termination, depth, state, and readability constraints.

competencies.statement: Create, update, search, append, extend, insert, remove, and clear lists with explicit mutation intent.
misconceptions: Every list method returns the changed list for chaining.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create, update, search, append, extend, insert, remove, and clear lists with explicit mutation intent.

competencies.statement: Use positive and negative indexing, slicing, strides, and bounds behavior without losing required elements.
misconceptions: A slice stop index is included in the result.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use positive and negative indexing, slicing, strides, and bounds behavior without losing required elements.

competencies.statement: Distinguish aliasing, shallow copy, nested mutable sharing, and deliberate independent copies.
misconceptions: Using list on a nested list recursively copies every contained object.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish aliasing, shallow copy, nested mutable sharing, and deliberate independent copies.

competencies.statement: Use tuples and unpacking for fixed-position records while choosing named structures when field meaning matters.
misconceptions: Tuples are immutable so every object they contain is also immutable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use tuples and unpacking for fixed-position records while choosing named structures when field meaning matters.

competencies.statement: Use sorted, list sort, key functions, reverse order, and stable multi-pass sorting with clear mutation behavior.
misconceptions: Sort and sorted both return a new list and preserve the original.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use sorted, list sort, key functions, reverse order, and stable multi-pass sorting with clear mutation behavior.

competencies.statement: Build readable list comprehensions with mapping and filtering while replacing deeply nested forms with explicit loops.
misconceptions: A comprehension is always clearer and faster than an equivalent loop.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build readable list comprehensions with mapping and filtering while replacing deeply nested forms with explicit loops.

competencies.statement: Estimate common sequence operation costs and measure performance before changing a correct data structure.
misconceptions: Big-O notation predicts exact wall-clock time for a program.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Estimate common sequence operation costs and measure performance before changing a correct data structure.

competencies.statement: Create, access, update, delete, and test dictionary entries with deliberate missing-key behavior.
misconceptions: Dictionary get inserts the default into the mapping when a key is absent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create, access, update, delete, and test dictionary entries with deliberate missing-key behavior.

competencies.statement: Iterate keys, values, and item views while preserving insertion order and avoiding size changes during iteration.
misconceptions: Dictionary views are frozen copies made when keys or values is called.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Iterate keys, values, and item views while preserving insertion order and avoiding size changes during iteration.

competencies.statement: Merge mappings and update nested records with explicit conflict, copy, and schema policies.
misconceptions: The dictionary union operator recursively merges nested dictionaries.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Merge mappings and update nested records with explicit conflict, copy, and schema policies.

competencies.statement: Use membership, union, intersection, difference, symmetric difference, and subset relations for uniqueness tasks.
misconceptions: Sets preserve insertion order as a portable language guarantee.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use membership, union, intersection, difference, symmetric difference, and subset relations for uniqueness tasks.

competencies.statement: Use frozenset and hashable keys when immutable set identity is part of a mapping or cache contract.
misconceptions: Any tuple can be a dictionary key even when it contains a list.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use frozenset and hashable keys when immutable set identity is part of a mapping or cache contract.

competencies.statement: Write mapping and set comprehensions whose key collisions and filtering behavior are explicit.
misconceptions: Duplicate dictionary-comprehension keys raise an exception automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write mapping and set comprehensions whose key collisions and filtering behavior are explicit.

competencies.statement: Use Counter, defaultdict, deque, ChainMap, and named records when their specialized behavior matches the task.
misconceptions: Specialized collections are always faster and should replace built-ins by default.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use Counter, defaultdict, deque, ChainMap, and named records when their specialized behavior matches the task.

competencies.statement: Match exception handlers to the hierarchy and catch the narrow failures the current boundary can recover from.
misconceptions: Catching Exception around an entire program is a reliable recovery strategy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Match exception handlers to the hierarchy and catch the narrow failures the current boundary can recover from.

competencies.statement: Use try, except, else, and finally so protected work, success work, and cleanup have distinct roles.
misconceptions: Finally runs only when an exception was raised.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use try, except, else, and finally so protected work, success work, and cleanup have distinct roles.

competencies.statement: Raise meaningful exceptions and preserve or suppress causes deliberately with exception chaining syntax.
misconceptions: Raising a new exception automatically keeps the original message visible without chaining.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Raise meaningful exceptions and preserve or suppress causes deliberately with exception chaining syntax.

competencies.statement: Define small domain-specific exception types only when callers need a meaningful recovery distinction.
misconceptions: Every validation rule needs its own exception class.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define small domain-specific exception types only when callers need a meaningful recovery distinction.

competencies.statement: Use with and context-manager protocols to guarantee acquisition and release across success and failure.
misconceptions: A with statement suppresses every exception raised inside the block.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use with and context-manager protocols to guarantee acquisition and release across success and failure.

competencies.statement: Log actionable context without secrets, preserve tracebacks, and distinguish user messages from operator evidence.
misconceptions: Printing the exception text always provides enough production diagnostics.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Log actionable context without secrets, preserve tracebacks, and distinguish user messages from operator evidence.

competencies.statement: Use pathlib to compose, inspect, resolve, traverse, and constrain filesystem paths portably.
misconceptions: String concatenation with slash characters is the most portable path strategy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use pathlib to compose, inspect, resolve, traverse, and constrain filesystem paths portably.

competencies.statement: Open text or binary files with explicit mode, encoding, newline, and context-managed lifetime.
misconceptions: The platform default text encoding is guaranteed to be UTF-8.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Open text or binary files with explicit mode, encoding, newline, and context-managed lifetime.

competencies.statement: Process large files incrementally and choose whole-file reads only when bounded size and simplicity justify them.
misconceptions: Readlines streams one line at a time without storing the file.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Process large files incrementally and choose whole-file reads only when bounded size and simplicity justify them.

competencies.statement: Read and write CSV with dialect, header, newline, type-conversion, and malformed-row policies.
misconceptions: Splitting each line on commas correctly parses every CSV file.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Read and write CSV with dialect, header, newline, type-conversion, and malformed-row policies.

competencies.statement: Encode and decode JSON while validating required shape, types, missing values, and unsupported Python objects.
misconceptions: JSON loading validates application schema and converts every date automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Encode and decode JSON while validating required shape, types, missing values, and unsupported Python objects.

competencies.statement: Write outputs through backup or temporary-file replacement so partial failure does not destroy the last good artifact.
misconceptions: Opening a destination in write mode preserves the previous content until close.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write outputs through backup or temporary-file replacement so partial failure does not destroy the last good artifact.

competencies.statement: Explain module search, import caching, names, qualified access, and circular-import failure conditions.
misconceptions: Import executes a module from scratch every time the statement appears.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Explain module search, import caching, names, qualified access, and circular-import failure conditions.

competencies.statement: Organize public module functions, constants, docstrings, and private implementation names around stable responsibilities.
misconceptions: A leading underscore makes an attribute inaccessible outside the module.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Organize public module functions, constants, docstrings, and private implementation names around stable responsibilities.

competencies.statement: Use the main guard to separate importable behavior from command-line execution and testing.
misconceptions: The main guard prevents the file from being imported.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use the main guard to separate importable behavior from command-line execution and testing.

competencies.statement: Create package and subpackage layouts with deliberate absolute or relative imports and no hidden path mutation.
misconceptions: Adding directories to sys.path inside code is normal package configuration.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create package and subpackage layouts with deliberate absolute or relative imports and no hidden path mutation.

competencies.statement: Create isolated virtual environments and record direct dependency and supported-Python constraints reproducibly.
misconceptions: A virtual environment makes dependency versions identical without a lock or constraints record.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create isolated virtual environments and record direct dependency and supported-Python constraints reproducibly.

competencies.statement: Read and author basic pyproject metadata, build-system, script entry point, and tool configuration boundaries.
misconceptions: Pyproject configuration is used only when publishing to a public package index.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Read and author basic pyproject metadata, build-system, script entry point, and tool configuration boundaries.

competencies.statement: Build a command-line interface with argparse subcommands, validated options, useful help, standard streams, and exit codes.
misconceptions: A command-line tool should print every error to standard output and exit zero.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build a command-line interface with argparse subcommands, validated options, useful help, standard streams, and exit codes.

competencies.statement: Distinguish iterable, iterator, iter, next, StopIteration, restartability, and one-pass consumption.
misconceptions: Calling iter on any iterator always creates a fresh independent iterator.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish iterable, iterator, iter, next, StopIteration, restartability, and one-pass consumption.

competencies.statement: Write generator functions with yield, local suspended state, return behavior, and cleanup-aware consumption.
misconceptions: Calling a generator function executes its body immediately and returns the first value.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write generator functions with yield, local suspended state, return behavior, and cleanup-aware consumption.

competencies.statement: Use generator expressions for single-pass pipelines while materializing when reuse or random access is required.
misconceptions: Generator expressions can be iterated repeatedly like lists.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use generator expressions for single-pass pipelines while materializing when reuse or random access is required.

competencies.statement: Compose islice, chain, pairwise, groupby, accumulate, and combinatoric tools with sortedness and memory constraints.
misconceptions: Groupby finds all equal values anywhere in an unsorted input.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compose islice, chain, pairwise, groupby, accumulate, and combinatoric tools with sortedness and memory constraints.

competencies.statement: Diagnose iterator exhaustion, late exceptions, retained resources, and partial consumption with explicit probes and tests.
misconceptions: Lazy pipelines raise every possible error when the pipeline is defined.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Diagnose iterator exhaustion, late exceptions, retained resources, and partial consumption with explicit probes and tests.

competencies.statement: Use date, time, datetime, timedelta, and timezone-aware values without comparing naive and aware timestamps.
misconceptions: A naive datetime automatically represents the local timezone unambiguously.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use date, time, datetime, timedelta, and timezone-aware values without comparing naive and aware timestamps.

competencies.statement: Use math and statistics functions with explicit domain, empty-input, precision, and outlier assumptions.
misconceptions: A mean is always the most representative summary of numeric data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use math and statistics functions with explicit domain, empty-input, precision, and outlier assumptions.

competencies.statement: Use random for simulation and secrets for security-sensitive tokens while controlling reproducibility where appropriate.
misconceptions: Seeding random makes its output suitable for passwords and reset tokens.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use random for simulation and secrets for security-sensitive tokens while controlling reproducibility where appropriate.

competencies.statement: Compile and test regular expressions with groups, boundaries, flags, escaping, and pathological-input awareness.
misconceptions: A greedy pattern always produces the most semantically correct match.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compile and test regular expressions with groups, boundaries, flags, escaping, and pathological-input awareness.

competencies.statement: Run external commands with argument lists, checked results, timeouts, captured streams, and no unsafe shell interpolation.
misconceptions: Shell true is required whenever a command contains more than one argument.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run external commands with argument lists, checked results, timeouts, captured streams, and no unsafe shell interpolation.

competencies.statement: Use named loggers, levels, structured context, handlers, and secret-safe messages without configuring libraries globally.
misconceptions: Library modules should call basicConfig so application logs always appear.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use named loggers, levels, structured context, handlers, and secret-safe messages without configuring libraries globally.

competencies.statement: Use assertions for programmer invariants and tests rather than recoverable user validation.
misconceptions: Running Python normally guarantees every assert statement remains enabled.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use assertions for programmer invariants and tests rather than recoverable user validation.

competencies.statement: Test one observable behavior with arrange-act-assert structure, deterministic data, and meaningful failure output.
misconceptions: A unit test must correspond to exactly one function in the implementation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test one observable behavior with arrange-act-assert structure, deterministic data, and meaningful failure output.

competencies.statement: Use fixtures and parametrized cases to expose meaningful variation without shared mutable test state.
misconceptions: A large fixture that builds the full application makes every unit test more realistic.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use fixtures and parametrized cases to expose meaningful variation without shared mutable test state.

competencies.statement: Choose fakes, stubs, spies, and mocks at external boundaries without asserting private call choreography unnecessarily.
misconceptions: Mocking every collaborator makes a test independent and therefore more valuable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose fakes, stubs, spies, and mocks at external boundaries without asserting private call choreography unnecessarily.

competencies.statement: Test filesystem, process, serialization, and package boundaries with controlled temporary environments.
misconceptions: Integration tests should use the developer machine home directory for realism.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test filesystem, process, serialization, and package boundaries with controlled temporary environments.

competencies.statement: Reproduce, minimize, hypothesize, inspect state, repair one cause, and rerun a named regression set.
misconceptions: Trying several changes together is faster because one of them may solve the defect.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reproduce, minimize, hypothesize, inspect state, repair one cause, and rerun a named regression set.

competencies.statement: Use coverage, mutation ideas, static analysis, formatting, and review as complementary evidence rather than score chasing.
misconceptions: One hundred percent line coverage proves the program is correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use coverage, mutation ideas, static analysis, formatting, and review as complementary evidence rather than score chasing.

competencies.statement: Turn stakeholder stories into explicit inputs, outputs, invariants, failures, acceptance checks, and staged implementation work.
misconceptions: Starting with all requested features is the fastest path to validated requirements.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Turn stakeholder stories into explicit inputs, outputs, invariants, failures, acceptance checks, and staged implementation work.

competencies.statement: Treat files, arguments, environment values, paths, and subprocess data as untrusted boundaries with least authority.
misconceptions: A local command-line program does not need input or path security.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat files, arguments, environment values, paths, and subprocess data as untrusted boundaries with least authority.

competencies.statement: Keep secrets out of source and logs while validating configuration presence, provenance, and safe defaults.
misconceptions: Environment variables are automatically safe to print and commit.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep secrets out of source and logs while validating configuration presence, provenance, and safe defaults.

competencies.statement: Measure time and memory on representative workloads before optimizing algorithms, data structures, or I/O.
misconceptions: Shorter source code is a reliable indicator of faster execution.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure time and memory on representative workloads before optimizing algorithms, data structures, or I/O.

competencies.statement: Produce a clean environment install, command entry point, version, dependency record, tests, and reproducible release checklist.
misconceptions: A program that runs from the source directory is proven installable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce a clean environment install, command entry point, version, dependency record, tests, and reproducible release checklist.

competencies.statement: Defend architecture, correctness, accessibility of terminal output, security, failure recovery, and future extensions with evidence.
misconceptions: A demonstration of the happy path is sufficient capstone evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend architecture, correctness, accessibility of terminal output, security, failure recovery, and future extensions with evidence.
